title: DrawUI — Component reference
subtitle: Live reference organized by class hierarchy: Control leaves (Text, Inputs), Container branches (Layout, Collections, Panels, Overlays, Shell), and Peers. Open full.html for Chart, DataGrid, GanttChart, and NodeGraph.

categories.title: Headings & titles
categories.description: Semantic headings and section titles.

items.title: Headings
items.summary: Semantic Heading primitive — level-specific h1–h6 factories are shortcuts.

items.title: Title
items.summary: Panel-style title text for section headers.

categories.title: Body text
categories.description: Body copy at different weights and block styles.

items.title: Text
items.summary: Default body copy.

items.title: Caption
items.summary: Secondary body copy via Caption (`new Caption()`).

items.title: Paragraph
items.summary: Block paragraph wrapper.

items.title: Span
items.summary: Generic inline wrapper for flowing text.

items.title: Disclaimer
items.summary: Muted helper or legal copy in a bordered callout.

categories.title: Rich text
categories.description: Markdown and links.

items.title: Markdown
items.summary: Markdown renderer — built-in converter in min; Showdown when peers are present.

items.title: Hyperlink
items.summary: Anchor with optional Material icon (`Hyperlink`).

categories.title: Inline labels
categories.description: Compact status and keyboard hints.

items.title: Badge
items.summary: Compact pill label for counts, status, or tags.

items.title: Keyboard hint
items.summary: Styled keyboard shortcut chip.

items.title: Code
items.summary: Inline code / API signature chip.

categories.title: Icons
categories.description: Material Symbols exported from the ICONS map.

items.title: Icon library
items.summary: All Material icon names shipped in the exported ICONS map.

categories.title: Media
categories.description: Images, SVG, and canvas drawing surfaces.

items.title: Image
items.summary: Image wrapper around `img`.

items.title: Svg
items.summary: Loads or clones an SVG with optional ID retargeting.

items.title: Canvas
items.summary: HTML canvas wrapper for custom 2D drawing.

categories.title: Actions
categories.description: Buttons and icon-only triggers.

items.title: Button
items.summary: Standard text button. Style variants use `.addClass("primary")` or `.addClass("secondary")`.

items.title: IconButton
items.summary: Tile-style IconButton with icon, label, and optional meta line.
items.options: { icon?: string, meta?: string, active?: boolean }

items.title: RibbonButton
items.summary: Borderless icon+label control with tab-style accent when selected.

items.title: Icon button
items.summary: Toolbar-style icon button with no label.

items.title: ToolbarButton
items.summary: Compact ToolbarButton for toolbars and fieldControl wrappers.

categories.title: Form inputs
categories.description: Labels, text fields, pickers, and toolbar-style field wrappers.

items.title: Label
items.summary: Field label text.

items.title: InputText
items.summary: Single-line text input.

items.title: InputTextArea
items.summary: Multi-line text input.

items.title: InputDropdown
items.summary: Dropdown select. Use `.setOptions({ key: label, … })` to populate choices.

items.title: InputSearch
items.summary: Search field with icon and callback on input.

items.title: Checkbox
items.summary: Boolean checkbox input.

items.title: InputNumber
items.summary: Floating-point numeric field.

items.title: InputInteger
items.summary: Whole-number field — same interaction model as number.

items.title: Slider
items.summary: Range track synced with a number field. Use `.setRange(min, max)`, `.setStep()`, `.setPrecision()`.

items.title: InputColor
items.summary: Native color input (`InputColor`).

items.title: InputDate
items.summary: Composite date and time picker (`InputDate`).

categories.title: Forms
categories.description: Composed form layouts built from field primitives.

items.title: Form
items.summary: A typical form: labels, fields, checkbox, and actions.
items.buildingBlocks: Composed from Form inputs and Actions. Parts below are the same primitives shown individually under Inputs.

categories.title: Theme
categories.description: Theme toggle and appearance helpers.

items.title: ThemeToggle
items.summary: Light/dark theme switch. Needs app `context` (config + signals) and an `ops.execute` handler.

categories.title: Layout & spacing
categories.description: Flex and grid containers, spacers, and separators.

items.title: StackPanel (row)
items.summary: Horizontal StackPanel. `new StackPanel({ isVertical: false })` is a shortcut for `isVertical: false`.

items.title: StackPanel (column)
items.summary: Vertical StackPanel. `new StackPanel({ isVertical: true })` is a shortcut for `isVertical: true`.

items.title: Grid
items.summary: CSS grid container with column helpers.

items.title: Horizontal spacer
items.summary: Adds horizontal space between inline or row items.

items.title: Vertical spacer
items.summary: Adds vertical space between stacked items.

items.title: Handle
items.summary: Drag or resize handle element. Pass `"drag"` or `"resize"` for the handle class.

items.title: Container
items.summary: Generic block Container — base building block.

items.title: Center
items.summary: Centers a child component via the centered class.

items.title: Divider
items.summary: Horizontal rule between block content.

items.title: Line break
items.summary: Forces a new line inside flowing text.

categories.title: Surfaces
categories.description: Styled containers for grouping content.

items.title: Card
items.summary: Elevated surface for grouped content.

items.title: Rectangle
items.summary: Neutral bordered panel shell (`Rectangle`).

categories.title: Tabs
categories.description: Self-managed tab containers (TabView extends Container).

items.title: TabView
items.summary: Self-managed TabView container. Use `.addTab(id, label, content)` and `.select(id)`. `TabItem` is the tab chrome created by `addTab`.

categories.title: Lists
categories.description: Selectable rows, rich list items, and drag-and-drop reorder.

items.title: InputList
items.summary: Selectable list container (`InputList`). Rows are created via `setItems()`. For label/value editors use PropertyGridRow.

items.title: Labeled box item
items.summary: List row with icon, label, and checkbox.
items.options: data: { id, label, checked? }, iconMap: Record<string, string>

items.title: SortableList
items.summary: Drag-and-drop reorder list with optional checkboxes.

categories.title: Hierarchy
categories.description: Nested data navigation — drill-down or expandable tree.

items.title: NavigationList
items.summary: One-level-at-a-time hierarchical navigation with a back control.

items.title: TreeView
items.summary: Expandable nested tree for the same hierarchical data shape.
items.options: { getLabel, getChildren, getId?, onItemClick, onToggle, expandRoot?}

categories.title: Property grids
categories.description: Label/value grids with editable cells.

items.title: PropertyGrid
items.summary: Label/value property editor grid. Demo shows common value types.
items.options: { compact?: boolean, title?: string, rows: Record<string, { label, value }> }

items.title: PropertyGridRow
items.summary: Single label/value row used standalone or inside PropertyGrid.

categories.title: Panel chrome
categories.description: ContentPanel scaffolds and accordion sections (Container specializations).

items.title: ContentPanel
items.summary: Resizable panel scaffold with Header and RibbonBar regions.

items.title: Header
items.summary: Shared title/icon/actions row for panel chrome.
items.options: { title?: string, icon?: string, actions?: Control[], alwaysActionsColumn?: boolean }

items.title: RibbonBar
items.summary: Horizontal ribbon row for panel footers or the app shell. Pair with RibbonButton.
items.options: elements?: Control[], justify?: string — defaults to "flex-end"

items.title: CollapsiblePanel
items.summary: Inline accordion section for sidebar or form groups.
items.options: { title?: string, icon?: string, collapsed?: boolean, className?: string }

categories.title: Reference
categories.description: Keyboard shortcut and help blocks.

items.title: Instruction panel
items.summary: Keyboard shortcut reference block.

parts.name: Instruction panel
parts.summary: Composed shortcut panel — pass an array of [key, description] pairs.

parts.name: Instruction line
parts.summary: Single shortcut row. Usually composed inside instructionPanel.
parts.note: Use instructionPanel for the full block; instructionLine builds individual rows.

categories.title: Feedback
categories.description: Progress, status, toasts, and tooltips.

items.title: ProgressBar
items.summary: Native progress element (`ProgressBar`). Value is 0–1.

items.title: ProgressRing
items.summary: Inline loading spinner with optional text (`ProgressRing`).

items.title: StatusBar
items.summary: Embeddable status bar with show/update/hide progress helpers.

items.title: Progress toast
items.summary: Progress overlay: `toast.show(target?, text?)`, `toast.update(pct, text?)`, `toast.hide()`.

items.title: Toast
items.summary: Transient notification banner. Progress mode uses the same class with show/update/hide.

items.title: Tooltip
items.summary: Hover tooltip attached to a host element via `.attachTo(dom)`.

categories.title: Floating windows
categories.description: Draggable and dockable floating surfaces.

items.title: FloatingDialog
items.summary: Lightweight draggable floating dialog built on ContentPanel.

items.title: FloatingWindow
items.summary: Free-floating overlay window with docking controls.

items.title: Flyout
items.summary: Expandable tool panel with badge and optional search row.
items.options: { title, icon, badgeCount?, position?: { top, right, … } }

categories.title: Dockable windows
categories.description: WorkspacePanel — dockable workspace panels that can also float.

items.title: WorkspacePanel
items.summary: Dockable workspace panel. With startFloating it works standalone as a floating window.
items.options: { context, tabId, tabLabel, icon?, title?, position?, startFloating?, floatingStyles? }
items.note: Full build. Docking into left/right/bottom tabs requires a WorkspaceLayout. Open full.html for the live demo.

categories.title: Menus
categories.description: Radial and contextual overlay menus.

items.title: RadialMenu
items.summary: Radial operator menu bound to a viewport element.
items.note: operators needs { canExecute(op, ctx), execute(op, ctx) }. Link styles/components/pie-menu.css.

categories.title: Navigation & splits
categories.description: SplitContainer and NavigationView — the AppShell base chain.

items.title: Split container
items.summary: Flex split layout for resizable panes.

items.title: NavigationView
items.summary: Sidebar + main content shell.

parts.name: NavigationView
parts.summary: Full shell with header, toggle, sidebar body, and main pane.

parts.name: ScrollViewer
parts.summary: Flex-fill scroll region used inside NavigationView and other shells.

categories.title: Workspace
categories.description: AppShell, WorkspaceLayout, and declarative world config.

items.title: AppShell
items.summary: SPA host with sidebar navigation and hash routing — powers this gallery.
items.note: The component reference itself is built with AppShell.

items.title: WorkspaceLayout
items.summary: Grid workspace with dockable WorkspacePanel stacks and resizers.
items.note: See examples/templates/ for a full workspace demo with WorldBuilder.

items.title: WorldBuilder
items.summary: Build the workspace DOM tree from declarative config before WorkspaceLayout init.
items.note: See examples/templates/ for a full WorldBuilder + WorkspaceLayout demo.

peerCategories.title: Charts
peerCategories.description: Chart.js visualizations via DrawUI.Chart(). Call .init() after the element is in the DOM. Peer: chart.js@4.4.7

items.title: Bar
items.summary: Vertical, horizontal, and stacked bar charts.
items.options: { chartConfiguration: { type: "bar", data, options }, height?, width?, minHeight? }
items.note: Peer: chart.js@4.4.7 — use indexAxis: "y" for horizontal; stacked scales for stacked bars.

siblings.name: Horizontal bar
siblings.summary: Bars along the Y axis via indexAxis: "y".

siblings.name: Stacked bar
siblings.summary: Multiple datasets stacked on a shared category axis.

items.title: Line
items.summary: Line and filled area series.
items.options: { chartConfiguration: { type: "line", data, options }, height?, width?, minHeight? }
items.note: Peer: chart.js@4.4.7 — set dataset.fill for area charts.

siblings.name: Line
siblings.summary: Connected points over categories or time.

siblings.name: Multi-series line
siblings.summary: Several line datasets on one chart.

siblings.name: Area
siblings.summary: Line chart with filled region under the curve.

items.title: Pie & doughnut
items.summary: Part-to-whole circular charts.
items.options: { chartConfiguration: { type: "pie" | "doughnut", data, options }, height?, width?, minHeight? }

siblings.name: Pie
siblings.summary: Full pie slices from categorical data.

items.title: Polar area & radar
items.summary: Radial charts for categorical magnitudes and multi-axis profiles.
items.options: { chartConfiguration: { type: "polarArea" | "radar", data, options }, height?, width?, minHeight? }

siblings.name: Polar area
siblings.summary: Sectors with equal angles and variable radius.

items.title: Scatter & bubble
items.summary: Point charts in continuous X/Y space; bubbles add a third size dimension.
items.options: { chartConfiguration: { type: "scatter" | "bubble", data, options }, height?, width?, minHeight? }
items.note: Peer: chart.js@4.4.7 — scatter/bubble use {x,y} (and r for bubble) point objects.

siblings.name: Scatter
siblings.summary: Individual points plotted by x and y.

siblings.name: Bubble
siblings.summary: Scatter points sized by a third value (r).

items.title: Mixed
items.summary: Combine chart types in one panel (e.g. bar + line) via per-dataset type.
items.options: { chartConfiguration: { data: { datasets: [{ type, ... }, ...] }, options }, height?, width?, minHeight? }
items.note: Peer: chart.js@4.4.7 — set type on each dataset; omit a top-level type or use a base type.

siblings.name: Bar + line
siblings.summary: Bars for volume with a line overlay for trend.

peerCategories.title: Spreadsheet
peerCategories.description: Editable grid via ag-Grid. Peer: ag-grid-community@35.2.1

items.title: DataGrid
items.summary: Editable AG Grid spreadsheet — call .init() after attach.

items.title: Gantt
items.summary: jsGantt-improved timeline. Pass task JSON to .render(tasks, container).

peerCategories.title: Markdown (GFM)
peerCategories.description: Same `Markdown` component with Showdown + Highlight.js peers loaded. Peers: showdown@2.1.0, @highlightjs/cdn-assets@11.11.1

items.title: Markdown (Showdown)
items.summary: GFM tables, task lists, and highlighted fences when Showdown peers are loaded.

items.title: NodeGraph
items.summary: Node graph editor — pass { nodes, connections } with id/name/status/level/children per node.
items.options: { nodes, connections, embedded?, readOnly?, onEdit?, onDelete?, onNodeClick? }
items.note: Full build only. Link styles/components/nodes.css (and hud.css for meta labels).

peerCategory.title: Spreadsheet
peerCategory.description: Editable grid via ag-Grid. Peer: ag-grid-community@35.2.1

items.title: DataGrid
items.summary: Editable AG Grid spreadsheet — call .init() after attach.
